integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OrangeHRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OrangeHRM web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to interact with the API.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL or SQLite database prompts executing UPDATE statements.

integrity.description: Status changes are performed in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The status changes are visible within the OrangeHRM candidate tracking interface, not just written into a local text file or script.
